name: ACCEPT_ANATOMY_SUPPORTED
detail: Accepted for broad bodyweight horizontal-push classification only. Bench/incline press evidence must not be treated as exact push-up evidence, and no exact push-up EMG or subtype-specific performance claim is made.

name: ACCEPT_WEAK_SOURCE_WITH_LIMITATION
detail: Accepted as a non-inverted free-weight horizontal-row family classification based on practical bodybuilding/anatomy sources. Existing inverted-row evidence must not be treated as exact evidence for this subtype. Muscle contribution and subtype-specific loading remain app-internal heuristics.

name: ACCEPT_VERIFIED_FAMILY
